name_en: Premium Original Leather M24706 This Capucines East West Small Handbag is crafted from deep-dyed lambskin, featuring Monogram floral motifs and faux crystals integrated into the top handle, creating a striking contrast between glossy metal and deep leather against the LV monogram. Removable and adjustable chain and leather shoulder straps allow for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 29 × 16.5 × 9 cm
